name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provid...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provid...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provide the message you'd like me to work with?

If you're looking to:
Copy/analyze a message
Create a message template
Extract information from a message
Or something else

Please share the message content or let me know what you need, and I'll assist you right away." == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provide the message you'd like me to work with?
If you're looking to:
Copy/analyze a message
Create a message template
Extract information from a message
Or something else
Please share the message content or let me know what you need, and I'll assist you right away."
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provide the message you'd like me to work with?
  + 
    If you're looking to:
    Copy/analyze a message
    Create a message template
    Extract information from a message
    Or something else
  + 
    Please share the message content or let me know what you need, and I'll assist you right away.
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provid...
E     Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provid...
